properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14 v15

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I saw the S-u-n go down yesterday And in it’s place darkness appeared I saw the grains of wheat awaiting the Sun’s return Without the promise of the Sun light They know they’ll surely die

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And after time and time had passed I saw a little sunlight at last A little more, then a little more Then a little sunlight than before

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But at the breaking of a brand new dawn I saw the fullness the risen Son I remember what God had done for me When He took my sins to Calvary.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Thank you for a faithful resurrection Lord Oh what a blessed consolation Lord When I found nothing of worth in me Now, You broke the seals of Calvary

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Amazing Grace how sweet the song I was lost but now am found And there is nothing going wrong I will witness for the rising of the Son.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I saw the S-o-n go down at Nicea Rome Before Paul left at Ephesus He said there’ll appear grievous wolves The serpent found a way to break the Son’s influence

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He preached this doctrines of lies So down and down the gospel went He showed a little light in Smyrna And many saw Him at Pergamos But then less light in Thyatira age And Luther saw him in Sardis age

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And It was 1750 a man by the name John Wesley He caught a little Son-light in Philadelphia And many saw it at Laodicea

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: But at the breaking of a brand new dawn The Son came clothed in a Cloud With one foot on sea and one on land The fullness of the Son was in the Son of man

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Thanks for Revelation 10-7 That man called William Branham He took the mystery of the risen Son To every kindred and nation

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Amazing Grace how sweet the song They were lost but then were found He gave the blind, the eyes to see And they were thankful For the rising of the Son

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Shalom its now the Bride Age To His elect is the brightest day We see the light in this evening time A pathway to glory we have found We know its no longer a one man ministry The Son has risen in you and me Revelation 10: 8 to 11 Upon us this Gospel has risen

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: But at the breaking of the brand-new dawn We were called out by this risen Son We have the sun in reality We have our own testimony

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: We slipped from time to eternity From this mortal to immortality Walked with straight the gold in purest white There the Lamb will be the light

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: Amazing Grace how sweet the song We were lost thank God were found He's given us the eyes to see And we were thankful For the rising of the Son
